articles.title: Federal employees can download TikTok on government devices, DOJ says
articles.content: WASHINGTON, July 17 (Reuters) - The U.S. Justice Department said on Friday that federal employees can now download the short-video app TikTok ‌on government devices. user data and operations to the joint venture TikTok USDS that was completed in January. In January, TikTok said the venture will retrain, test and update TikTok's ‌content recommendation algorithm on U.S. ⁠user data and the algorithm will be secured in Oracle's U.S. Oracle is one of the venture's three main investors. The memorandum ⁠opinion to President Donald Trump said the current version of TikTok does not pose risks.
